notes: Full food menu captured including antipasti, pasta, grill, sides, and desserts. Beverage/drinks section was listed in navigation but no drink items appeared in the raw text; beverages array is empty. Menu is explicitly noted as highly seasonal and subject to daily changes. Double-cut ribeye has a variable price range depending on weight.
